name: Balu Sivaiah
title: Software Engineer – Angular & Frontend Developer
tagline: 4+ years building scalable Angular apps | Migrated AngularJS → Angular 19 | 40% performance boost
about: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience in frontend development specializing in Angular, TypeScript, and modern UI frameworks. Proven track record of improving application performance by 40% through large-scale migration from AngularJS to Angular 19. Passionate about delivering scalable, high-quality solutions by leveraging expertise in UI optimization, testing frameworks, and seamless API integrations.

points: Migrated enterprise apps from AngularJS/Angular 4 to Angular 17–20, delivering 40% performance improvement and reducing technical debt
Built reusable components, services, and pipes in TypeScript; implemented RxJS for async data handling and NgRx for centralized state management
Crafted responsive interfaces using Angular Material, SCSS, and Tailwind CSS; optimized with Lazy Loading, Route Guards, and AG Grid custom renderers boosting rendering efficiency by 30%
Achieved 90%+ code coverage across applications using Karma and Jasmine
Integrated RESTful APIs with Java/Spring Boot backends within Agile/Scrum teams
Monitored application health and performance on AWS; triggered Jenkins builds via pull requests for deployments on AWS ECS
Leveraged AWS Kiro with Autopilot and Supervised Modes for AI-driven code generation and task automation
Applied Spec-Driven Development and integrated MCP (Model Context Protocol) for context-aware, AI-assisted workflows

education.institute: Bharath Institute of Higher Education and Research
